name: anomaly
title: Anomaly Detection Widget
description: The dashboard's AI/ML anomaly-detection renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="anomaly") is filled by the OOW.anomaly renderer with a single token-themed SVG: a seeded time-series drawn as a smooth cubic-bezier line, wrapped in a shaded confidence band (the learned baseline ± a tolerance), a faint dashed mean baseline, and any sample that breaches the band flagged as a red dot inside a soft pulsing ring. The series colour is data-driven (data-color, a SVAR key or hex) and injected as generated SVG data, while the band opacity, baseline and the always-red anomaly markers are decoupled from the series colour and themed from design tokens. Output is deterministic from opts.seed, so it renders identically every load. Depends on the shared series / smoothPath / rng / SVAR utils. Presentational by default, with a focus ring when the mount is focusable and a stale/paused disabled treatment.
